```mermaid
classDiagram
    class axiosConfigHeaders {
        +string acceptVersion
        +Object return
    }
    class HeadersObject {
        +Object headers
    }
    class Headers {
        +string x-time-zone
        +string Accept
    }
    axiosConfigHeaders --> HeadersObject
    HeadersObject --> Headers
    Headers : moment.tz.guess()
    Headers : application/json
```
